startGuideForMac1:
Press the green button at the top-left
corner of the app window to enter
full screen.
startGuideForMac2:
In the menu bar at the top of the screen,
click View, then turn off Always Show
Toolbar in Full Screen.
startGuideForMac3:
Click the Start button at the top-left
of the extension to begin using donuTool!
startGuideForWindows1:
Press the F11 key on your keyboard to
activate fullscreen mode.
startGuideForWindows2:
Press the start button at the top left
of the extension to begin using donuTool!
